channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: South Africa Alone Gets Visa-Free Access to Russia, Others Face Restrictions
item.description: Russia has outlined visa-free travel conditions for select African countries, with South Africa being the only nation allowing visa-free entry for all passport holders. Citizens from 16 other African ...

item.title: NGO Advocates Enhanced Safeguards for Domestic Workers
item.description: The article highlights a call by a non-governmental organization (NGO) for improved legal and social protections for domestic workers in Tanzania. The NGO emphasizes the need for stricter regulations ...

item.title: Dune: Part Three Concludes the Trilogy with Emotional Farewell
item.description: The article discusses the final chapter of the *Dune* film trilogy, *Dune: Part Three*, directed by Denis Villeneuve. It highlights the emotional closure for the cast, including Timothée Chalamet, who...

item.title: Russia's Diesel Ban and Geopolitical Tensions Impact Mining Transport Costs in South Africa
item.description: The article discusses how Russia's diesel export ban, triggered by Ukrainian drone attacks on its refining infrastructure, has disrupted global diesel markets. This has led to soaring diesel prices, s...

item.title: LTFRB Imposes P60 Cap on App-Based Taxi Booking Fees
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has implemented a new regulation limiting the booking and platform fees for app-based taxis to a maximum of P60. This measure, outlined...

item.title: Challenges for Apartment Dwellers in Adopting Rooftop Solar in Australia
item.description: The article highlights the disparity in solar adoption between standalone homes and apartment dwellers in Australia. Research by Energy Consumers Australia reveals that 39% of homeowners have solar, c...

item.title: Messi Comments on Viral Photo with Lamine Yamal Ahead of World Cup Final
item.description: Lionel Messi described the viral photo of himself holding baby Lamine Yamal as 'crazy' during a press conference ahead of their World Cup final matchup. The image, which shows Messi cradling the infan...

item.title: Tanzania Insight News Update: July 18, 2026
item.description: On July 18, 2026, Tanzania Insight reported on two key events. First, Tanzanian President Fattah's visit to Egypt aimed to strengthen bilateral relations, focusing on trade, investment, and regional c...

item.title: World Cup Sparks Growth in Soccer Participation Across Northern Ontario
item.description: The article highlights how the World Cup has ignited renewed interest in soccer among youth in northern Ontario, leading to increased participation and local initiatives. While the main story focuses ...

item.title: Omtatah Calls for Clarity on 3-Year Delay in KEMRI Leadership Appointment
item.description: Busia Senator Okiya Omtatah has raised concerns about the prolonged vacancy at Kenya Medical Research Institute (KEMRI), which has operated without a substantive director-general since 2022. In a stat...

item.title: Health Impacts of Prolonged Fasting: A Scientific Overview
item.description: The article explores the physiological changes in the human body during prolonged fasting, citing studies that show significant shifts in energy sources and organ functions. It highlights weight loss,...

item.title: Burna Boy And Shakira Rehearse For FIFA World Cup Final Halftime Performance

item.title: Shark Attack Injures Scuba Diver Off Tasmania's Adventure Bay
item.description: A 31-year-old scuba diver was injured in a shark attack off the coast of Tasmania's Bruny Island, according to police reports. The incident occurred around 9:10 am on Saturday when the man, who was sp...

item.title: Labour Party Selects Andy Burnham as New Leader Following Leadership Contest
item.description: Veteran Labour Party politician Andy Burnham has been chosen as the new leader of the UK's governing party, becoming Britain's next prime minister without a general election. Burnham secured the neces...

item.title: Australian arrested at US airport for overstaying visa
item.description: Footage from a Las Vegas airport shows an Australian citizen being tackled and handcuffed by immigration officers after allegedly overstaying their visa. The incident, captured on camera, has sparked ...

item.title: R'Bonney Gabriel Reflects on Emotional Experience After 'Project Runway' Elimination

item.title: Donald Trump Criticizes England's Tactical Approach in World Cup Defeat
item.description: US President Donald Trump joined the chorus of critics targeting England's tactical decisions during their FIFA World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina. Speaking at a reception in New York alongside FI...

item.title: DNA Test Reveals 38-Year-Old Birth Switch Lawsuit Against North Dakota Hospital
item.description: Two men, Kyle Bylin and Jeremy Morrison, discovered through DNA tests that they were switched at birth 38 years ago, leading their families to sue Unity Medical Center in North Dakota. The lawsuit all...

item.title: Dorset Council Faces Conflict Over Winfrith Nuclear Site Restoration Plans
